expectations.text: Runs yt-search script with a query related to Claude Code and Obsidian
Shows the full YouTube search results to the user with metadata
expectations.evidence: Final output includes a table with all 10 results showing title, channel, subs, views, duration, date, and URL

expectations.text: Auto-selects videos without asking the user to pick
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows immediate auto-selection after search results with no user prompt. Selected 7 videos autonomously.

expectations.text: Explains which videos were selected and why
expectations.evidence: Detailed selection table with per-video reasoning: dropped #1 (own video), #8 (duplicate channel), #10 (off-topic + duplicate). Explained engagement ratios for selected videos.
Created 'YT Research: Claude Code + Obsidian Use Cases' with ID 28ca2904-b381-4fcb-a252-3c42b2ebb1b7

expectations.text: Adds selected YouTube URLs as sources
expectations.evidence: All 7 selected YouTube URLs added as sources, all processed successfully with zero failures

expectations.text: Runs notebooklm ask questions about key themes and takeaways
expectations.evidence: Ran 3 analysis questions: use cases with examples, areas of agreement/disagreement, and actionable takeaways. Used --new on first question.

expectations.text: Presents a summary with a Key Takeaways section
expectations.evidence: Final output has '## Key Takeaways' section with 6 bullet points, followed by ranked use cases, agreement/disagreement, and pain points

expectations.text: Does NOT ask unnecessary confirmation questions mid-pipeline
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows continuous execution from Step 0 through Step 5 with no user interaction points. Only pause was for auth check (Step 0) which passed immediately.

bonus_observations: Correctly identified and dropped the user's own video (Chase AI) — smart contextual awareness
Handled Windows Unicode encoding error gracefully (PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 fix)
Saved research note to /research/ following vault conventions with wiki links
Used --new flag on first notebooklm ask (improvement we added was followed)
Pre-flight auth check (Step 0 improvement) executed correctly
